<?php declare(strict_types=1); /* * This file is part of PHPUnit. * * (c) Sebastian Bergmann <sebastian@phpunit.de> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace PHPUnit\Framework\MockObject\Generator; /** * @internal This class is not covered by the backward compatibility promise for PHPUnit */ final class MethodNamedMethodException extends \PHPUnit\Framework\Exception implements Exception { public function __construct() { parent::__construct('Doubling interfaces (or classes) that have a method named "method" is not supported.'); } }
